title: Boomstick
body:
A funny little idea a friend of mine came up with. Explode all the things!

 

Place the Suspicious Lever on any block a regular lever can stick on and enjoy blowing up your friend's furnace?

Craft it like a lever, but add TNT. Or just craft a lever with TNT.

 

 

By default, anything that has half the explosion resistance of obsidian will not be explodified - can be adjusted in boomstick-common.toml

If anyone wants an easier way to chat or ask questions here's a Discord link: https://discord.gg/sKwS3c62uM
